title: SquareIo ModPack
description: This is a pre-made modpack for SquareIO Skyblock
body:
# 🌌 SquareIO Companion Pack | Official Client Modpack

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90f4d768b2404c60605d6755831c8403e0460dac_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/server/squareio-skyblock-infinit-server)

Welcome to the official client-side companion modpack for **SquareIO**, the ultimate unlimited, open-world Skyblock Infinite server! 

While SquareIO is built natively on a heavily customized server architecture that allows 100% vanilla clients to connect, using this official modpack unlocks the definitive multiplayer experience. It features seamless proximity voice chat, jaw-dropping performance optimizations, fluid animations, and vital client-side quality-of-life utilities.

---

## 🚀 Key Features of this Pack

### 🎙️ Immersive Proximity Voice Chat
* **Plasmo Voice:** Fully configured to hook straight into the server's dedicated voice ports. Talk seamlessly with your neighbors across the open void without needing third-party software. Press **`V`** in-game to set up your microphone!

### ⚡ Next-Gen Performance Suite (No OptiFine Needed)
* **Sodium:** Massive FPS multiplication using a completely rewritten modern rendering engine.
* **ImmediatelyFast & Entity Culling:** Drastically speeds up rendering for menus, text, HUD elements, particles, and hidden chests/mobs. Perfect for massive skyblock automated farms.
* **Dynamic FPS:** Automatically lowers resource usage when you alt-tab to check Discord or guides.

### 🎭 Visual & Animation Overhauls
* **Iris Shaders:** Full, seamless support for your favorite modern shader packs.
* **Not Enough Animations:** Syncs perfectly with the server to show smooth, realistic 3rd-person animations for eating, drinking, rowing, and more.
* **LambDynamicLights:** Items like torches and lanterns emit actual light in real-time while held in your hand or dropped on the floor.
* **Zoomify:** Smooth, customizable cinematic zoom transitions (replicates the classic `C` key feel).

### 🛠️ Quality of Life Utilities
* **Shulker Box Tooltip:** Preview Shulker box contents instantly by hovering and pressing `Shift`.
* **AppleSkin:** Visualizes exact hunger and saturation values directly on your food bar.
* **Inventory Profiles Next:** Sleek client-side inventory and chest sorting mechanics.
* **Axolotl Client Side:** Allows you to safely walk and navigate while looking in your inventory.

---

## 🌌 About the Server: SquareIO

SquareIO is a borderless, multiplayer world driven by Modrinth's revolutionary **Skyblock Infinite** progression mechanics. Instead of traditional bedrock box islands, travel across an endless void, build massive bridges, meet neighbors, and team up naturally.

* **♾️ Open-World Skyblock:** Fully seamless, infinite void exploration.
* **🏝️ 17 Unique Starter Islands:** Choose carefully from 17 distinct layouts to start your sky empire.
* **🌾 Dedicated Resource World:** A resettable `/resources` world so you never run out of blocks.
* **📈 Free In-Game Rankups:** 8 distinct, completely free gameplay tiers to unlock powerful utilities.
* **🤝 Vanilla Friendly:** Powered by Patbox's server-side mods, meaning un-modded vanilla friends can still join you any time.

---

## 🎮 How to Get Started

1. Click **Install** on this modpack inside the Modrinth App.
2. Launch the profile.
3. Head to **Multiplayer** -> **Add Server**, paste the SquareIO server IP, and connect!
4. Once inside, press **`V`** to configure your proximity chat settings, and type `/island` to start your Skyblock adventure!
